response.justification: The candidate lacks the specialized experience in hardware-software co-design, SoC/IP modeling, and AI accelerator optimization required for this role. While they have strong software engineering and system architecture experience, their background is heavily focused on web/mobile development, embedded systems, and general software engineering rather than deep-learning workload analysis, GPU architecture, or hardware-software co-design for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with expertise in multiple languages and frameworks
Experience with performance optimization in low-latency applications and real-time systems
Proven ability to work in diverse technical environments and deliver complex projects
concerns: No demonstrated experience with AI accelerator hardware, SoC/IP modeling, or performance bottleneck analysis for deep-learning workloads
Lacks the required background in SIMD/MIMD architecture or GPU workload optimization
Educational path (Bachelor's in CS) doesn't meet the minimum qualifications without equivalent professional experience in the required domains

key_factors.factor: AI accelerator and deep-learning workload optimization
System architecture design for hardware optimization
